allow: Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); print\('App created OK'\)")
Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app = create_app\(\); print\([r.rule for r in app.url_map.iter_rules\(\) if 'reports' in r.rule]\)")

Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app=create_app\(\); from app.models import Report, User; ctx=app.app_context\(\); ctx.push\(\); print\('users:', User.query.count\(\), '| reports:', Report.query.count\(\)\); ctx.pop\(\)")
Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app=create_app\(\); print\([r.rule for r in app.url_map.iter_rules\(\) if 'report' in r.rule.lower\(\)]\)")

Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app=create_app\(\); from app.models import State, City, Category; ctx=app.app_context\(\); ctx.push\(\); print\('states:', State.query.count\(\), '| cities:', City.query.count\(\), '| categories:', Category.query.count\(\)\); print\('sample:', [\(s.code, [c.name for c in s.cities]\) for s in State.query.limit\(2\)]\); ctx.pop\(\)")

Bash(python -c "from app import create_app; app=create_app\(\); from app.models import State, Suburb, Category; ctx=app.app_context\(\); ctx.push\(\); print\('states:', State.query.count\(\), '| suburbs:', Suburb.query.count\(\), '| categories:', Category.query.count\(\)\); print\('routes:', [r.rule for r in app.url_map.iter_rules\(\) if 'report' in r.rule.lower\(\)]\); ctx.pop\(\)")
